title: Build the Sentence — Word Order Practice

content.instruction: Each question gives you a set of words. Tap them in the correct order to form a complete sentence.

source.text: Pay attention to word order, capitalization, and the final punctuation mark.

activities.instruction: Use ALL the given words to form one correct sentence. The final answer should end with a period.

answers.Q1: She went to the market yesterday.
answers.Q4: They have been friends since childhood.
